description: EB announcement age-escape calibration on the recommended mechanism (both-dynamic-strict-threshold, window 5, target 0.5, denominator 16). thr-noescape is the pure threshold (starvation candidate at trickle loads); thr-k5/k10/k20 add the age escape (announce below threshold once K ranking blocks have passed since the last EB announcement); plain-reserved-ref sets the threshold to 1 byte (announce at every opportunity - the K -> 0 limit, bit-identical to plain reservation); flat-fee is the control. Run under trickle-0p1, trickle-0p5, and low load profiles: the trickles probe starvation and the escape's certificate cost, low checks the escape stays inert when the threshold crosses naturally
